title: Umea Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Umea, with a Z-Score of -3.31. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umea are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The Z-Score of -3.31 indicates that this cold snap is a rare and unusual event. 
 The high HDD value of 12.6 GG and low CDD value of 0.0 GG further emphasize the severity of the cold snap, with humidity at 77% and wind speed at 13.3 km/h.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
